metadata.title:
BATTLE ROYAL AT


CITY HALL TONIGHT

pages.raw_text:
With the chamber of commerce
arrayed on one side and the united
forces of organized labor on the
other, battle royal is expected at
the meeting of the city council to-
might, as committee of the whole
l to consider the raise in wages for


the men and teamsters employed
by the city and by city contractors.
AT recent session the city coun-


Gil voted to have the corporation
counsel draw up an ordinance pro-


viding for the raise of % cents a
: day in the wages of common labor
!. ers and 81 in the wages of team
sters. In the meantime, before the
ordinance had been prepared, the
schamber of commerce registered a
protest against granting the pro-
posed raise, claiming that it would
have tendency to fill the city with
laborers. So the council voted to
have the whole matter discussed


before the committee of the whole
tonight, giving everybody chance
/ to talk


In addition to the representatives
from the two teamsters unions and
( the two Federal unions, the central
labor council has voted to attend
